docket_entries.description: ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE GRANTED

THE CLAIM OF EXEMPTION SET FOR FEB-22-2016 IS DENIED."THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR'S CLAIM OF EXEMPTION IS DENIED. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WARREN, PATRICK LUSHINE, JOLENE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NOONAN, GEORGE ERIK $5,250.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,315.00, STATUTORY DAMAGES IN THE AMOUNT OF $3500 HAVE BEEN ADDED TO THE JUDGMENT DUE TO DEFENDANT'S FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH CIVIL CODE SECTION 1950.5 (L) IN BAD FAITH .
